decision_value: A directly verified SAT extension settles C(12,6,4)=40; replayed UNSAT excludes one newly validated link orbit and determines whether frontier work remains relevant.
fixed_protocol: Exactly orbit-8-t-16 then orbit-9-t-17, 300 seconds each, fixed residual sequential encoding; stop after SAT or two results.
hypothesis: At least one newly discovered point-link orbit may extend to a valid 40-block cover, a higher-value test than generic frontier or local search.
stop_rule: SAT stops immediately for direct validation; otherwise stop after both fixed-cap outcomes for independent replay review.
